evals.prompt: run unit tests for the workout feature only
evals.expected_output: Agent runs ./gradlew :feature:workout:testDebugUnitTest with JAVA_HOME set correctly

evals.prompt: I just changed some mapper code in core:data. Can you build and make sure everything compiles and tests pass for that module?
evals.expected_output: Agent builds and runs tests specifically for :core:data module, not all modules

evals.prompt: the build failed with some KSP error, can you help me figure out what went wrong and fix the lint warnings too?
evals.expected_output: Agent diagnoses the KSP error (likely Room/Hilt annotation issue), then runs lintDebug and reads the report
